```mjs title=empty.mjs
// ./empty.js


export {};

```

```mjs title=main.mjs
// ./index.js
it("should keep an empty async chunk as ESM", async () => {
  const mod = await import("./empty.mjs");

  expect(typeof mod).toBe("object");
  expect(Object.keys(mod).filter((key) => key !== "__esModule")).toHaveLength(0);
});

export {};

```
